summary: Dan Shapiro announces he's reviving his blog after leaving Photobucket to pursue a new business idea. The blog was previously dedicated to woodworking under the name 'Nothing Severed Yet,' but he signals a shift toward more varied content. The old woodworking posts remain archived. It's a brief, transitional post marking the start of a new chapter.
key_points: Shapiro left Photobucket and is 'gainfully unemployed,' signaling a pivot to entrepreneurship
The blog is transitioning from a niche woodworking blog to a broader platform
Old woodworking content is preserved, showing respect for past work while moving forward
money_quotes: What with being gainfully unemployed and all, I've decided to revisit my blog.
Those of you with long memories or penchants for manly crafts may remember this URL as the home of 'Nothing Severed Yet', my woodworking blog.
key_insight: A lighthearted reintroduction post marking Shapiro's transition from corporate life to independent entrepreneurship, pivoting his blog from woodworking to broader topics.
